title: Preserve the selected ticket when switching into the Detail tab
summary: The workbench previously switched `activeTab` to `detail` before capturing the source tab's selected ticket, which could open the wrong ticket in Detail and mis-target subsequent actions.
recommendedAction: Capture the previously selected ticket before changing tabs and carry that ref into Detail so tab-driven navigation and actions target the highlighted ticket truthfully.

title: Surface failed detail loads instead of retrying forever
summary: The lazy detail loader previously retried on every render after a failed read and kept the Detail surface stuck on a loading message instead of falling back to summary-only context.
recommendedAction: Track failed detail refs, stop auto-retrying on every render, and render an explicit summary-only fallback state for unavailable detail reads.

title: Use summary state for closed-ticket status actions when detail is missing
summary: The status submenu previously derived its reopen-vs-update behavior from loaded detail state instead of the selected ticket summary, which could expose invalid closed-ticket status actions when detail data was unavailable.
recommendedAction: Use `summary.closed` consistently when building status actions and add a regression test for closed tickets with missing detail data.

title: Preserve the selected ticket when switching into the Detail tab
summary: The workbench previously switched `activeTab` to `detail` before capturing the source tab's selected ticket, which could open the wrong ticket in Detail and mis-target subsequent actions.
resolutionNotes: `setActiveTab()` now snapshots the source tab's current selection before changing `activeTab`, and the new regression test proves tab-cycling into Detail retains the highlighted ticket.

title: Surface failed detail loads instead of retrying forever
summary: The lazy detail loader previously retried on every render after a failed read and kept the Detail surface stuck on a loading message instead of falling back to summary-only context.
resolutionNotes: The workbench now records failed detail refs, avoids endless retry loops, and shows explicit summary-only fallback text instead of permanent loading.

title: Use summary state for closed-ticket status actions when detail is missing
summary: The status submenu previously derived its reopen-vs-update behavior from loaded detail state instead of the selected ticket summary, which could expose invalid closed-ticket status actions when detail data was unavailable.
resolutionNotes: The status submenu now uses summary state consistently, and a regression test proves closed tickets expose `reopen` even when detail loading fails.
